function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { not T0.lte(x0, x1) or T0.lt(x0, x1) or x0 = x1 }[Nat](b, c)
function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { not T0.lt(x0, x1) or T0.lte(x0, x1) }[Nat](a.pow(b), a.pow(c))
function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { not T0.lt(x0, x1) or x0 != x1 }[Nat](a.pow(b), a.pow(c))

goal: b = 0 or exists(k0: Nat) { b = k0.suc }
proof: not 0 = b
not exists(k0: Nat) { k0.suc = b }
function(x0: Nat) { exists(k0: Nat) { k0.suc = x0 } or 0 = x0 }(b)
function[T0: Monoid](x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: T0) { x0.suc != x1 or T0.mul(x2, T0.pow(x2, x0)) = T0.pow(x2, x1) }[Nat](c, c.suc, a)
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { x0 * x1 = x1 * x0 }(a.pow(c), a)
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { 1 != x0 * x1 or 1 = x0 }(a, a.pow(c))
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { x0 * x1 = x1 * x0 }(a, a.pow(c))
function[T0: Monoid](x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: T0) { x0.suc != x1 or T0.mul(x2, T0.pow(x2, x0)) = T0.pow(x2, x1) }[Nat](1, 1.suc, a)
function(x0: Nat) { x0 + 1 = x0.suc }(1)
function(x0: Nat) { x0.pow(1) = x0 }(a)
